title: trachypleurum subovatum
intro: Trachypleurum subovatum is a species of plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It is native to the tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Trachypleurum subovatum include relief from respiratory problems, wound healing, and reducing fever, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
